series_metadata.series_description: Spreadsheet listings of inactive or discontinued licensee files, files include pharmacist, intern, terminal distributor of dangerous drugs, wholesale distributor of dangerous drugs and case files that are sent to the Board''''s offsite storage facility.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The log should retain the licensing file records for a period of (3) years until the scheduled shred date and destruction of the files, the data may then be deleted from the log., Electronic: Delete
